nasb.text: And He will judge between the nations, And will render decisions for many peoples; And they will hammer their swords into plowshares and their spears into pruning hooks. Nation will not lift up sword against nation, And never again will they learn war.

esv.text: He shall judge between the nations, and shall decide disputes for many peoples; and they shall beat their swords into plowshares, and their spears into pruning hooks; nation shall not lift up sword against nation, neither shall they learn war anymore.

cnv.text: 他要在列國施行審判， 為多國的人斷定是非。 他們必把刀打成犁頭，把矛槍打成鐮刀。 這國不舉刀攻擊那國， 他們也不再學習戰爭。

ccb.text: 祂必在各国施行审判， 为列邦平息纷争。 他们必将刀剑打成犁头， 把矛枪制成镰刀。 国与国不再刀兵相见， 人们不用再学习战事。

csbs.text: 他将在列国中行审判， 为多民作裁决。 他们将把自己的刀剑打成犁头， 把长矛打成镰刀。 这国不举起刀剑攻击那国， 他们也不再学习战事。
